rulings.Case Title: PATRICK A MISSUD et al VS. D.R. HORTON, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Stay Per Ccp Sections 916 Et Seq., And 1021 Et Seq; Request For Oral Testimony
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 23, 2011, line 9. PLAINTIFFS PATRICK MISSUD, JULIE MISSUD'S Motion For Stay Per CCP Sections 916 Et Seq., And 1021 Et Seq. Granted. Judgment stayed pending final resolution of the appeal from the sister state judgment in Nevada. CCP 1710.50 (a)(1). Plaintiff to post an undertaking for the full amount of the judgment: $48,691.97. CCP 1710.50 (c)(1). Defendant's evidentiary objections are sustained. Plaintiff's request for oral testimony is denied. =(302/PHA)
